laws.title: Right to Equality
laws.description: The State shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws.
laws.applies_to: Any discriminatory treatment by employer or state authority

laws.title: Protection Against Discrimination in Employment
laws.description: Prohibits discrimination on grounds of religion, race, caste, sex or place of birth.
laws.applies_to: Discriminatory hiring, firing, or promotion practices

laws.title: Right to Equal Opportunity in Public Employment
laws.description: Guarantees equal opportunity in matters of public employment.
laws.applies_to: Government employment and public sector jobs

laws.title: Right to Freedom of Speech
laws.description: Every citizen has the right to freedom of speech and expression.
laws.applies_to: Employees speaking out about workplace issues or misconduct

laws.title: Right to Practice Any Profession
laws.description: Every citizen has the right to practice any profession or carry on any occupation, trade or business.
laws.applies_to: Unlawful termination or restriction on professional practice

laws.title: Right to Life and Personal Liberty
laws.description: No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.
laws.applies_to: Workplace harassment, unsafe conditions, or violation of personal dignity

laws.title: Right Against Exploitation
laws.description: Prohibits traffic in human beings and forced labour.
laws.applies_to: Forced work without pay or bonded labour situations

laws.title: Right to Constitutional Remedies
laws.description: Right to move the Supreme Court for enforcement of fundamental rights.
laws.applies_to: When fundamental rights are violated and legal remedy is needed

laws.title: Right Against Unlawful Arrest
laws.description: Every arrested person has the right to know the grounds of arrest and consult a lawyer.
laws.applies_to: Unlawful detention of employees or company officials

laws.title: Right to Freedom of Religion
laws.description: All persons are equally entitled to freedom of conscience and the right to practice religion.
laws.applies_to: Religious discrimination in workplace, forced religious practices

laws.title: Right to Move Freely
laws.description: Every citizen has the right to move freely throughout the territory of India.
laws.applies_to: Forced relocation of employees, travel restrictions

laws.title: Right to Education
laws.description: The State shall provide free and compulsory education to all children aged 6-14 years.
laws.applies_to: Child labour cases, denial of education benefits

laws.title: Protection of Data and Privacy
laws.description: Companies must implement reasonable security practices to protect sensitive personal data.
laws.applies_to: Data breaches, unauthorized access to personal information, email monitoring

laws.title: Unauthorized Access to Computer Systems
laws.description: Prohibits unauthorized access to computer systems and networks.
laws.applies_to: Hacking, unauthorized email access, system intrusion

laws.title: Cyber Crime and Data Theft
laws.description: Punishes dishonest or fraudulent acts using computer resources.
laws.applies_to: Cyber fraud, data theft, computer crimes against a company

laws.title: Online Defamation
laws.description: Punishes sending offensive or false messages through communication devices.
laws.applies_to: Online harassment, false posts, social media defamation

laws.title: Protection of Trade Secrets
laws.description: Agreements to protect trade secrets and confidential business information are enforceable.
laws.applies_to: Breach of NDA, sharing trade secrets with competitors

laws.title: Breach of Contract
laws.description: Party who suffers due to breach of contract is entitled to compensation.
laws.applies_to: When a business partner or employee violates a contract

laws.title: Fraudulent Misrepresentation in Contract
laws.description: A contract obtained by fraud or misrepresentation can be voided.
laws.applies_to: Contracts signed based on false information or fraudulent claims

laws.title: Sexual Harassment at Workplace
laws.description: Provides protection against sexual harassment at workplace and redressal mechanism.
laws.applies_to: Any form of sexual harassment at the workplace

laws.title: Unfair Labour Practices
laws.description: Prohibits unfair labour practices by employers against workers.
laws.applies_to: Unfair dismissal, layoffs without proper procedure, union busting

laws.title: Wrongful Termination
laws.description: Mandates proper notice and compensation before terminating an employee.
laws.applies_to: Employees fired without proper notice or compensation

laws.title: Retrenchment Compensation
laws.description: Retrenched workers are entitled to compensation based on years of service.
laws.applies_to: Mass layoffs, company downsizing, retrenchment without compensation

laws.title: Standing Orders — Workplace Rules
laws.description: Employers must define and follow proper disciplinary procedures for employees.
laws.applies_to: Improper disciplinary action, arbitrary suspension, unfair show cause notices

laws.title: Minimum Wages
laws.description: Employers must pay employees at least the minimum wage fixed by the government.
laws.applies_to: Underpayment of wages or salary disputes

laws.title: Non-Payment of Wages
laws.description: Ensures timely payment of wages to employees without unauthorized deductions.
laws.applies_to: Delayed or withheld salary payments

laws.title: Bonus Rights
laws.description: Employees earning below a threshold are entitled to annual bonus payment.
laws.applies_to: Denial of annual bonus or profit-sharing disputes

laws.title: Gratuity Rights
laws.description: Employees who have completed 5 years of service are entitled to gratuity payment.
laws.applies_to: Denial of gratuity after completing 5 or more years of service

laws.title: Provident Fund Rights
laws.description: Mandates employer contribution to employee provident fund for retirement savings.
laws.applies_to: Non-payment or misuse of provident fund contributions

laws.title: Employees State Insurance
laws.description: Mandates health insurance coverage for employees earning below a threshold.
laws.applies_to: Denial of ESI benefits, non-payment of ESI contributions

laws.title: Maternity Benefits
laws.description: Provides maternity leave and benefits to female employees during pregnancy.
laws.applies_to: Denial of maternity leave or firing a pregnant employee

laws.title: Equal Remuneration
laws.description: Mandates equal pay for equal work regardless of gender.
laws.applies_to: Gender-based salary discrimination, pay disparity between men and women

laws.title: Workplace Safety
laws.description: Mandates safe working conditions and health standards in workplaces.
laws.applies_to: Unsafe working conditions, workplace accidents, health hazards

laws.title: Contract Labour Regulation
laws.description: Regulates employment of contract labour and protects their rights.
laws.applies_to: Rights of contract workers, contractor disputes, outsourced employees

laws.title: Child Labour Prohibition
laws.description: Prohibits employment of children below 14 years in hazardous occupations.
laws.applies_to: Child labour violations, underage employment

laws.title: Right Against Search Without Warrant
laws.description: Police must have proper warrant before conducting search and seizure operations.
laws.applies_to: Unauthorized raids on company premises without proper warrant

laws.title: Right to Fair Investigation
laws.description: Police are legally bound to register FIR and investigate cognizable offences.
laws.applies_to: Filing police complaints, FIR registration, criminal investigation

laws.title: Companies Act — Director Duties
laws.description: Directors must act in good faith and in the best interest of the company.
laws.applies_to: Director misconduct, conflict of interest, breach of fiduciary duty

laws.title: Shareholder Rights
laws.description: Protects rights of shareholders including voting rights and dividend entitlement.
laws.applies_to: Denial of shareholder rights, dividend disputes, voting issues

laws.title: Corporate Fraud
laws.description: Punishes fraud in relation to company affairs with imprisonment and fine.
laws.applies_to: Falsification of accounts, corporate misrepresentation, audit fraud

laws.title: Intellectual Property Protection
laws.description: Protects inventions, creative works, and intellectual property from unauthorized use.
laws.applies_to: Theft of inventions, copyright infringement, patent violations

laws.title: Trademark Protection
laws.description: Protects registered trademarks and brand names from unauthorized use.
laws.applies_to: Brand name copying, trademark infringement, counterfeit products

laws.title: Copyright Infringement
laws.description: Prohibits unauthorized copying or reproduction of copyrighted works.
laws.applies_to: Copying of software, content, designs or creative works

laws.title: Right to Information
laws.description: Citizens can request information from government bodies and public authorities.
laws.applies_to: Seeking information from government departments or public sector companies

laws.title: Prevention of Money Laundering
laws.description: Prohibits money laundering and requires financial institutions to report suspicious transactions.
laws.applies_to: Financial fraud, money laundering, corrupt practices

laws.title: Competition Law
laws.description: Prohibits anti-competitive practices and abuse of dominant market position.
laws.applies_to: Monopolistic practices, price fixing, unfair competition

laws.title: Consumer Protection
laws.description: Protects consumers against unfair trade practices and defective products.
laws.applies_to: Defective products, false advertising, service deficiencies

laws.title: GST Compliance
laws.description: Mandates proper GST compliance including invoicing and tax payment.
laws.applies_to: GST fraud, tax evasion, invoicing disputes

laws.title: Income Tax
laws.description: Governs taxation of income and mandates proper tax deduction at source.
laws.applies_to: Tax evasion, TDS disputes, income tax violations

laws.title: Insolvency and Bankruptcy
laws.description: Provides resolution framework for insolvency of companies and individuals.
laws.applies_to: Company bankruptcy, debt recovery, creditor rights

laws.title: Arbitration and Dispute Resolution
laws.description: Provides mechanism for resolving commercial disputes through arbitration.
laws.applies_to: Business disputes, contract disagreements, commercial conflicts

laws.title: Environmental Compliance
laws.description: Mandates environmental protection standards for industries and businesses.
laws.applies_to: Environmental violations, pollution, improper waste disposal

laws.title: Foreign Exchange Management
laws.description: Regulates foreign exchange transactions and cross-border payments.
laws.applies_to: Foreign investment disputes, forex violations, international payments

laws.title: Prevention of Corruption
laws.description: Prohibits bribery and corruption involving public servants.
laws.applies_to: Bribery of government officials, corrupt practices

laws.title: Whistleblower Protection
laws.description: Protects persons who expose corruption or wrongdoing from retaliation.
laws.applies_to: Employees facing retaliation for reporting misconduct or corruption

laws.title: Defamation Law
laws.description: Protects individuals and companies from false and damaging statements.
laws.applies_to: False accusations, reputation damage, defamatory statements

laws.title: Cheating and Fraud
laws.description: Punishes dishonest deception that causes harm to another person.
laws.applies_to: Business fraud, financial cheating, misrepresentation in contracts

laws.title: Criminal Breach of Trust
laws.description: Punishes misappropriation of property entrusted to a person.
laws.applies_to: Embezzlement, misuse of company funds, breach of fiduciary duty

laws.title: Extortion
laws.description: Punishes anyone who puts another in fear to dishonestly induce delivery of property.
laws.applies_to: Blackmail, threats, coercion to extract money or favors

laws.title: Forgery
laws.description: Punishes making false documents or tampering with genuine documents.
laws.applies_to: Forged contracts, fake signatures, tampered documents

laws.title: Criminal Conspiracy
laws.description: Punishes two or more persons who agree to commit a criminal act.
laws.applies_to: Organized corporate fraud, planned misappropriation, group cheating

laws.title: Wrongful Confinement
laws.description: Punishes wrongful restraint or confinement of a person.
laws.applies_to: Employees held against their will, illegal detention in workplace

laws.title: Intimidation and Criminal Intimidation
laws.description: Punishes threatening a person with injury to cause alarm or force action.
laws.applies_to: Threats from employer, intimidating employees, coercive conduct

laws.title: Digital Signature and Electronic Records
laws.description: Gives legal validity to digital signatures and electronic records.
laws.applies_to: Disputes over digital contracts, electronic signatures, online agreements

laws.title: SEBI Regulations — Insider Trading
laws.description: Prohibits trading in securities based on unpublished price-sensitive information.
laws.applies_to: Stock market fraud, insider trading, securities manipulation

laws.title: SEBI Regulations — Market Fraud
laws.description: Prohibits fraudulent and unfair trade practices in securities markets.
laws.applies_to: Stock market manipulation, misleading investors, pump and dump schemes

laws.title: RERA — Real Estate Regulation
laws.description: Regulates real estate sector and protects property buyers from fraud and delays.
laws.applies_to: Construction delays, property fraud, builder disputes

laws.title: Negotiable Instruments — Cheque Bounce
laws.description: Punishes issuing cheques without sufficient funds in bank account.
laws.applies_to: Bounced cheques from clients, business partners, or employees

laws.title: Specific Relief — Enforcement of Contracts
laws.description: Courts can order specific performance of contracts that cannot be compensated by money.
laws.applies_to: Enforcing unique contracts, seeking injunctions, preventing breach

laws.title: Limitation Act — Time Limit for Cases
laws.description: Sets time limits within which legal cases must be filed in court.
laws.applies_to: Time limits for filing civil cases, contract disputes, recovery suits

laws.title: Transfer of Property
laws.description: Governs transfer of property between living persons including sale and mortgage.
laws.applies_to: Property sale disputes, mortgage issues, lease agreement problems

laws.title: Stamp Duty on Documents
laws.description: Mandates proper stamp duty payment on legal documents and agreements.
laws.applies_to: Improperly stamped contracts, stamp duty disputes

laws.title: Registration of Documents
laws.description: Certain documents must be registered to be legally valid and enforceable.
laws.applies_to: Unregistered property deals, unregistered agreements

laws.title: Partnership Firm Disputes
laws.description: Governs rights and duties of partners in a partnership firm.
laws.applies_to: Partner disputes, profit sharing issues, dissolution of firm

laws.title: Limited Liability Partnership
laws.description: Governs formation and operation of Limited Liability Partnerships.
laws.applies_to: LLP partner disputes, liability issues, LLP dissolution

laws.title: Income Tax — TDS Deduction
laws.description: Employers must deduct and deposit TDS from employee salaries to the government.
laws.applies_to: Non-deduction of TDS, TDS not deposited, Form 16 disputes

laws.title: Goods and Services Tax — Input Credit
laws.description: Businesses can claim input tax credit on GST paid for business purchases.
laws.applies_to: ITC disputes, GST refund issues, blocked input credit

laws.title: Labour Code — Wages
laws.description: Consolidates laws on wages and provides universal minimum wage floor.
laws.applies_to: Wage disputes, minimum wage violations, unlawful deductions

laws.title: Labour Code — Social Security
laws.description: Consolidates social security laws covering PF, ESI, gratuity for all workers.
laws.applies_to: Social security benefits for gig workers, platform workers, informal employees

laws.title: Labour Code — Industrial Relations
laws.description: Regulates industrial disputes, strikes, lockouts and trade union activities.
laws.applies_to: Strike rights, lockout disputes, trade union recognition

laws.title: Occupational Safety Code
laws.description: Consolidates laws on occupational safety, health and working conditions.
laws.applies_to: Workplace safety violations, hazardous working conditions, industrial accidents

laws.title: Personal Data Protection
laws.description: Governs collection, processing and protection of personal digital data.
laws.applies_to: Unauthorized data collection, data breach, consent violations

laws.title: Information Technology Rules — Intermediary
laws.description: Regulates social media intermediaries and grievance redressal for digital platforms.
laws.applies_to: Social media content removal, platform disputes, online content grievances

laws.title: Black Money Act
laws.description: Targets undisclosed foreign income and assets held by Indian residents.
laws.applies_to: Undisclosed foreign assets, offshore account disputes

laws.title: Benami Transactions
laws.description: Prohibits benami transactions where property is held in another person's name.
laws.applies_to: Property held in fictitious names, benami property disputes

laws.title: Narcotics and Drug Laws
laws.description: Controls and regulates narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances.
laws.applies_to: Drug testing at workplace, drug-related termination disputes

laws.title: Domestic Violence Protection
laws.reference: Protection of Women from DV Act 2005
laws.description: Protects women from domestic violence and provides legal remedies.
laws.applies_to: Domestic abuse affecting work, protection orders, workplace safety for victims

laws.title: Scheduled Caste and Tribe Protection
laws.description: Protects Scheduled Castes and Tribes from discrimination and atrocities.
laws.applies_to: Caste-based workplace discrimination, atrocities against SC/ST employees

laws.title: Persons with Disability Rights
laws.reference: Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act 2016
laws.description: Provides equal rights and non-discrimination for persons with disabilities.
laws.applies_to: Disability-based employment discrimination, accessibility issues

laws.title: Senior Citizen Protection
laws.description: Protects senior citizens from abuse and provides maintenance rights.
laws.applies_to: Age-based discrimination, mandatory retirement disputes

laws.title: Apprentices Act
laws.description: Regulates training of apprentices and their rights including stipend payment.
laws.applies_to: Apprentice rights, stipend disputes, training violations

laws.title: Shops and Establishment Act
laws.description: Regulates working conditions in shops and commercial establishments.
laws.applies_to: Overtime disputes, working hours violations, rest day denials in commercial establishments

laws.title: Professional Tax
laws.description: States levy professional tax on salaried individuals and businesses.
laws.applies_to: Professional tax deduction disputes, non-remittance of professional tax

laws.title: Recovery of Debts
laws.description: Provides fast-track tribunals for recovery of debts owed to banks and financial institutions.
laws.applies_to: Bank loan defaults, debt recovery disputes, NPA resolution

laws.title: SARFAESI Act — Secured Assets
laws.description: Allows banks to seize and sell secured assets for loan recovery without court order.
laws.applies_to: Bank seizure of mortgaged property, NPA enforcement actions

laws.title: Public Procurement — Tender Rules
laws.description: Governs transparent procurement of goods and services by government bodies.
laws.applies_to: Tender fraud, unfair government procurement, bid rigging

laws.title: Micro and Small Enterprise Protection
laws.description: Mandates timely payment to micro and small enterprises within 45 days.
laws.applies_to: Delayed payments to MSME vendors, MSME payment disputes

laws.title: Food Safety Regulations
laws.description: Regulates food safety standards and licensing for food businesses.
laws.applies_to: Food quality violations, FSSAI compliance issues, food business disputes

laws.title: Drug and Cosmetics Regulation
laws.description: Regulates manufacture, sale and distribution of drugs and cosmetics.
laws.applies_to: Pharmaceutical compliance, drug quality disputes, fake medicine cases

laws.title: Insurance Regulation
laws.description: Regulates insurance companies and protects policyholders' rights.
laws.applies_to: Insurance claim disputes, policy cancellation, insurance fraud
